title: avenula pratensis
intro: Avenula pratensis, also known as meadow oat grass, is a perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avenula pratensis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support cardiovascular health. Avenula pratensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
